structuredData.name: VidPulse

hero.title: Dein kostenloses KI-Creator-Toolkit
hero.subtitle: Von der Idee bis zum Zeitplan: VidPulse hilft dir, konsistent zu planen, optimieren und veröffentlichen—ohne zehn Tools.

features.title: Everything you need to grow
features.subtitle: A focused set of tools for modern YouTube workflows—simple, fast, and cost-aware.

ideas.title: AI idea generator
ideas.description: Generate video ideas and angles in seconds, then iterate with prompts.

seo.title: SEO-ready titles
seo.description: Craft better titles, tags, and descriptions with structured guidance.

competitors.title: Competitor tracking
competitors.description: Follow channels you admire and learn from what’s working.

workflow.title: Production workflow
workflow.description: Keep scripts, notes, and status in one place—from draft to publish.

calendar.title: Scheduling calendar
calendar.description: Plan uploads, reschedule with drag & drop, and stay consistent.

pricing.title: Pricing that stays simple
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.finePrint: You can start on the Free plan and upgrade anytime.

free.label: Free
free.description: Essentials to plan and publish consistently.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

0.a: Yes. The Free plan includes the core toolkit and limited AI usage.

1.q: Do I need to connect YouTube?
1.a: You can explore the landing experience without connecting. Connecting unlocks analytics and scheduling.

2.a: VidPulse supports 9 languages including English, Italian, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese, Russian, Japanese, and Chinese.

3.q: Can I use my own workflow?
3.a: Yes. You can adapt the workflow to match your production process and update statuses as you go.

4.a: Yes. The landing page and core app screens are responsive and dark-mode friendly.

5.a: Click “Get Started Free” to open the app and begin planning your next upload.

finalCta.title: Ready to publish consistently?
finalCta.subtitle: Start free and ship your next video with less friction.

footer.tagline: A free toolkit for modern YouTube creators.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body: VidPulse is provided as-is for creators. By using the service you agree to use it responsibly and comply with applicable laws. We may update these terms; continued use constitutes acceptance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: We store account data and workspace content to provide the service. We do not sell personal data. You can request deletion by contacting support. Third-party providers (Supabase, Google, YouTube) process data according to their policies.

blog.comingSoon: Our blog is coming soon. Check back for product updates and YouTube growth tips.
